strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production environments, directly matching the core stack requirement
Demonstrated clean-code and TDD discipline (RIDE Capital, Altom), aligning with the role's interest in clean software architecture
AI/LLM API integration and MCP tooling experience from re:cinq satisfies the highest-value nice-to-have qualification
concerns: Significantly overqualified — 15+ years at Senior/Staff level; a junior/mid role is unlikely to retain or challenge this candidate beyond a short runway
PostgreSQL not mentioned anywhere in the resume; relational DB exposure is limited to MySQL and SQL generics, with heavy NoSQL usage (MongoDB)
Current career gap since October 2025 with no stated reason raises questions about availability, expectations, or fit for a high on-site-presence environment
response.justification: Bogdan brings a technically strong, well-rounded fullstack profile with exactly the TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and Kubernetes coverage the role values, plus bonus LLM/agentic experience that is explicitly listed as a nice-to-have. The central risk is that this is a junior-to-mid-level position and the candidate is a decade beyond that band; compensation expectations, growth trajectory, and long-term retention are likely to be misaligned regardless of technical fit. The PostgreSQL gap is bridgeable but worth probing given it is the preferred database in the job description.
